hooks.command: result=$(gh run list --repo eincode0/keyball_gesture_led --limit 3 --json status,conclusion,displayTitle,createdAt 2>/dev/null | jq -r '.[] | "  \(.conclusion // .status)\t\(.displayTitle)"' 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$result" ]; then echo "{\"systemMessage\": \"🔨 最新ビルド:\\n$result\"}"; fi
